tasks.name: Add glass effect tokens to theme.css
tasks.purpose: Define custom properties for glassmorphism blur, opacity, and border values

dependencies: Color tokens from F1 (--homepage-glass-border uses rgba)
constraints: Must use --homepage-glass- prefix for all tokens
Add tokens inside existing @theme inline block
Follow existing custom property syntax

tasks.input_state: theme.css exists with @theme inline block containing typography, color, and animation tokens from F1
tasks.output_state: theme.css contains 3 new glass effect tokens: --homepage-glass-blur (12px), --homepage-glass-bg-opacity (0.6), --homepage-glass-border (rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08))
tasks.acceptance_criterion: All 3 glass effect tokens are defined with correct values from design spec

tasks.name: Create glass-card utility class
tasks.purpose: Implement primary glass card utility with backdrop blur, translucent background, and subtle border

constraints: Add class in @layer utilities block
Use CSS custom properties via var()
Include border-radius: 16px from design spec
Must work with both dark and light modes

tasks.input_state: globals.css has @layer utilities block; theme.css has glass effect tokens
tasks.output_state: globals.css contains .homepage-glass-card utility class with backdrop-filter, background, border, and border-radius properties
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Class .homepage-glass-card applies glassmorphism effect using design tokens and works in both dark/light modes
tasks.verification_command: grep -c 'homepage-glass-card' apps/web/styles/globals.css | grep -q '^1$' && grep -A 5 'homepage-glass-card' apps/web/styles/globals.css | grep -q 'backdrop-filter' && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Create spotlight-card base utility class
tasks.purpose: Implement base styles for cards that will have cursor-following spotlight effects

constraints: Add class in @layer utilities block
Use position: relative for spotlight layering
Include subtle inner glow on hover
Complementary to CardSpotlight component (CSS handles static, component handles interactive)

tasks.input_state: globals.css has glass-card utility from T2; CardSpotlight component exists for reference
tasks.output_state: globals.css contains .homepage-spotlight-card utility class with position, border, and hover states for spotlight effect base
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Class .homepage-spotlight-card provides base styles for spotlight cards with proper positioning and hover states
tasks.verification_command: grep -c 'homepage-spotlight-card' apps/web/styles/globals.css | grep -q '^1$' && grep -A 8 'homepage-spotlight-card' apps/web/styles/globals.css | grep -q 'position: relative' && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Create stat-card utility class
tasks.purpose: Implement card utility optimized for displaying large numbers with accent glow

dependencies: Accent tokens from F1 (for number glow)
constraints: Add class in @layer utilities block
Use large font size for numbers (text-display-lg)
Include subtle glow effect behind numbers
Minimal supporting text styling

tasks.input_state: globals.css has glass-card and spotlight-card utilities from T2-T3; F4 animation utilities exist
tasks.output_state: globals.css contains .homepage-stat-card utility class with large number styles, accent glow, and supporting text formatting
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Class .homepage-stat-card styles statistic cards with prominent numbers, accent color glow, and muted labels

tasks.name: Create gradient-orb utility class
tasks.purpose: Implement background gradient orb utility for section decoration

dependencies: Design spec: large blurred circles at 10-15% opacity
constraints: Add class in @layer utilities block
Use radial-gradient with accent color
Apply filter: blur() for soft edges
Position: absolute for layering behind content

tasks.input_state: globals.css has card utilities from T2-T4; accent gradient tokens exist in theme.css
tasks.output_state: globals.css contains .homepage-gradient-orb utility class with radial gradient, blur filter, and opacity
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Class .homepage-gradient-orb creates large blurred circular gradient at 10-15% opacity for section backgrounds
tasks.verification_command: grep -c 'homepage-gradient-orb' apps/web/styles/globals.css | grep -q '^1$' && grep -A 6 'homepage-gradient-orb' apps/web/styles/globals.css | grep -q 'radial-gradient' && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Create grid-pattern utility class
tasks.purpose: Implement subtle dot or line grid pattern overlay for depth

dependencies: Design spec: dot or line grid at 3-5% opacity
constraints: Add class in @layer utilities block
Use background-image with repeating-linear-gradient or radial-gradient
Apply low opacity (3-5%)
Should not interfere with content readability

tasks.input_state: globals.css has gradient-orb utility from T5
tasks.output_state: globals.css contains .homepage-grid-pattern utility class with repeating gradient creating subtle grid overlay
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Class .homepage-grid-pattern creates subtle grid overlay at 3-5% opacity that adds depth without distraction
tasks.verification_command: grep -c 'homepage-grid-pattern' apps/web/styles/globals.css | grep -q '^1$' && grep -A 6 'homepage-grid-pattern' apps/web/styles/globals.css | grep -q 'repeating' && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Create noise-texture utility class
tasks.purpose: Implement subtle grain overlay for tactile quality on glass surfaces

dependencies: Design spec: grain overlay at 2-3% opacity
constraints: Add class in @layer utilities block
Use inline SVG data URI or reference /textures/noise.svg
Apply 2-3% opacity
Optional enhancement (nice-to-have from feature spec)

tasks.input_state: globals.css has grid-pattern utility from T6
tasks.output_state: globals.css contains .homepage-noise-texture utility class with SVG noise background at 2-3% opacity; optional noise.svg file created if using external reference
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Class .homepage-noise-texture applies subtle grain overlay that adds premium tactile quality without being distracting

tasks.name: Add performance documentation comments
tasks.purpose: Document which glass effects are GPU-intensive and performance considerations

constraints: Add comments above each performance-sensitive utility
Note that backdrop-filter is GPU-intensive
Suggest prefers-reduced-motion alternatives
Document best practices for judicious use

tasks.input_state: globals.css contains all glass effect utilities from T2-T7
tasks.output_state: globals.css has documentation comments above each utility class noting performance impact and usage guidance
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Comments document GPU-intensive properties (backdrop-filter), suggest reduced-motion fallbacks, and guide developers on performance-conscious usage
